ValidationRule.description: Restrict Project-Farma Users to Close Won Opportunities. Only Specific users should be able to close the opportunity as Won
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND(
fxRecordTypeDevName__c = "Project_Farma" , $User.ProfileName__c = "PROFILE: PKI Project Farma", ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Won"), NOT( $Permission.Can_Close_as_Closed_Won_Project_Farma ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_Project_Farma: You are not authorized to set this Opportunity to Closed Won Stage. Please refer to your manager in order for help.
